# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account CI/CD Access

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID
    Default: o-xxxxxxxxxx
  
  TrustedAccountPrefix:
    Type: String
    Description: Prefix for trusted account IDs (e.g., 123456)
    Default: '123456'

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CICDCrossAccountRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 
                - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${TrustedAccountPrefix}*:root'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDDeploymentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:*'
                  - 's3:*'
                  - 'lambda:*'
                  - 'apigateway:*'
                  - 'ec2:Describe*'
                  - 'ec2:CreateTags'
                  - 'elasticloadbalancing:*'
                  - 'autoscaling:*'
                  - 'ecs:*'
                  - 'ecr:*'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
                  - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
                  - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
                  - 'iam:PassRole'
                  - 'iam:GetRole'
                  - 'iam:CreateRole'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DetachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRolePolicy'
                Resource: '*'
      MaxSessionDuration: 43200
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICD
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD Cross-Account Role
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: CICDCrossAccountRoleArn
  
  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD Cross-Account Role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRole
    Export:
      Name: CICDCrossAccountRoleName
